title: Maximize Sum Of Array After K Negations
titleCn: K 次取反后最大化的数组和

testcases.input: nums = [4,2,3], k = 1 Output: 5 Explanation: Choose index 1 and nums becomes [4,-2,3].
nums = [3,-1,0,2], k = 3 Output: 6 Explanation: Choose indices (1, 2, 2) and nums becomes [3,1,0,2].
nums = [2,-3,-1,5,-4], k = 2 Output: 13 Explanation: Choose indices (1, 4) and nums becomes [2,3,-1,5,4].
